rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE to match AADL data types.
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions.
Write range assumptions using named constants or visible variables.
Ensure that output guarantees relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or features.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in type-level contracts.
Do not use Boolean data ports in numeric range comparisons without explicit scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
